I need to analyze the code to identify which files/classes belong to the `cli` package, then count internal relations.

Looking at the code provided, I can identify the packages based on file paths and imports. The code shown includes:

- `mermaid/` package files (auto-repair, comment-generator, diagram-generator, generator, grouper, etc.)
- `parsers/` package files (class-extractor, interface-extractor, enum-extractor, relation-extractor, typescript-parser, parallel-parser, etc.)

There is no `cli` package represented in this codebase excerpt. No files are shown with a `cli/` path prefix, and no CLI-specific classes (like command handlers, CLI entry points, etc.) appear in the code above.
